title: Product entity
description: A packaged product record (DATA-11). Metadata fields (id, slug, name, brandId, categoryId) are plain scalars and exempt from provenance. Every fact-bearing field reuses the SourcedValue envelope by $ref (DATA-09). The structured allergens array is distinct from the free-text ingredientsText and nests its provenance under a single provenance $ref. Verification and publication status are reserved empty for the Phase 2 gate (DATA-11).

brandId.description: Plain reference to a brand record id.

categoryId.description: Plain reference to a category id.

manufacturer.description: Fact-bearing: the named manufacturer of the current product, sourced.

ingredientsText.description: Fact-bearing: the free-text declared ingredients list, sourced. Distinct from the structured allergens array.

nutrition.description: Back-of-pack nutrition declaration per 100g. Each figure is fact-bearing and reuses the SourcedValue envelope.

regulatoryStatus.description: Fact-bearing regulatory-position field. Marked claimDomain regulatory so the TRUST-06 referential gate (plan 01-05) can key on it. The allOf combines the shared envelope with a const, adding no new property, so the envelope's additionalProperties false is satisfied.

allergens.description: Structured 14-allergen field, distinct from the free-text ingredientsText. Each item nests its provenance under a single provenance $ref; the envelope is NOT spread via allOf siblings (its additionalProperties false would reject every record).

allergen.description: One of the 14 GB-regulated allergen ids, kept in sync with src/_data/allergens.json (verified by test/schema-consistency.test.js).

provenance.description: The sourced provenance for this allergen determination.

verificationStatus.description: Derived-only entity status (D-03/R-06): computed from the entity's facts every build, so any author-set value is rejected by Ajv. Only null validates.

publicationStatus.description: Derived-only entity status (D-03/R-06): computed from the entity's facts every build, so any author-set value is rejected by Ajv. Only null validates.

nutritionValue.description: A back-of-pack nutrition figure: the SourcedValue envelope with its value constrained to a non-negative number, so a string, negative, null or object cannot pass as a numeric fact. Constraining the existing `value` property adds no new key, so the envelope's additionalProperties:false still holds.
